---
name: pipeline-ops
description: Maintain local job-search pipeline files, templates, scores, and reminders.
user_invocable: true
---

# Pipeline Ops

This skill is for local workflow operations, not generic opportunity analysis.

## Tasks
- Create or update company notes
- Create or update position files
- Keep score-dependent lists clean
- Link artifacts such as tailored resumes
- Surface undocumented local files
- Reconcile reminders with pipeline state

## Rules
- Do not place unscored opportunities in active scored lists.
- Keep summary files lightweight; store full detail in role-specific notes.
- Ask before processing ambiguous or undocumented items.
- Treat the local note system as the source of truth for opportunity state.
